calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Nov-29-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Name Change.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.
Petitioner Lilian Miwa Maher present in court.
Petitioners Sworn and examined.
Proof of Publication on file. Proof of Service on other parent (father) of Petition for name change was filed on Nov. 28, 2012.
Father Leonardo Rafael Torres Sworn and examined. Father did not file a timely objection to petition. Court orverruled father's oral objection to the proposed name change of minor.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.
The court grants the petition for Chande of Name of minor from Masanori Antonio Torres-Mukai to Masanori Antonio Maher.
Decree Changing Name signed in open court.
